concepts.rationale: Rescue lowest P+D game stack-rush (P=68, D=33) by swapping loop and adding sound.
concepts.prompt_seed: Rescue the game "Stack Rush". Keep core mechanic, replace weakest loop with near_miss_reward, add audio feedback, tighten first-tap payoff, cap session to 60s.

concepts.rationale: Best feature=tap/touch/silent/viral, hot circuit=near_miss_reward, cold circuit=progress_pressure, engine share=0.55; promote under-tested combos.
